programme.title: The Contractor
programme.desc: Framed for murder, a former assassin (Wesley Snipes) goes on the run to prove his innocence.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Hard Luck
programme.desc: A former criminal (Wesley Snipes) goes on the run with a stripper (Jacquelyn Quinones) after a drug deal goes bad.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Game of Death
programme.desc: Framed for murder, an agent (Wesley Snipes) must dodge assassins while trying to clear his name.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Blue Thunder
programme.desc: Frank Murphy is a courageous and honorable Los Angeles police officer who is chosen to test run Blue Thunder, a high-tech experimental attack helicopter. While flying Blue Thunder, Murphy and his partner discover that the government intends to use the helicopter for corrupt crowd control and surveillance.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Sahara
programme.desc: An Army sergeant (James Belushi), his crew (Mark Lee, Paul Empson) and stragglers try to hold off a Nazi battalion at a Libyan waterhole.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Ultimate Countdown
programme.desc: Influential movies from the 80s.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ultimate Countdown
programme.desc: Influential movies from the 80s.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Tarawa Beachhead
programme.desc: A Marine sergeant (Kerwin Mathews) falls in love with the widow (Julie Adams) of a comrade shot in combat by their lieutenant (Ray Danton).

programme.title: The Desperate Mission
programme.desc: A Mexican outlaw/folk hero (Ricardo Montalban) and his men agree to bring a land baron's wife to 1840s San Francisco.

programme.title: Glory
programme.desc: Following the Battle of Antietam, Col. Robert Gould Shaw (Matthew Broderick) is offered command of the United States' first all-African-American regiment, the 54th Massachusetts Volunteer Infantry. With junior officer Cabot Forbes (Cary Elwes), Shaw puts together a strong and proud unit, including the escaped slave Trip (Denzel Washington) and the wise gravedigger John Rawlins (Morgan Freeman). At first limited to menial manual tasks, the regiment fights to be placed in the heat of battle.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Alvarez Kelly
programme.desc: Alvarez Kelly (William Holden) is a Mexican cattle rancher who is doing his best to stay out of the Civil War. He has no interest in which side may win or lose -- Kelly is far more concerned about his own survival, and about making money. He soon finds himself in the middle of the conflict, however, when a confederate colonel (Richard Widmark) captures the rancher and forces Kelly to help his soldiers steal a nearby herd of cattle, which they desperately need for food.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Heroes of Telemark
programme.desc: In this fact-based film, as Axis and Allied scientists race to create the first atomic bomb, British Intelligence receives shocking news of significant breakthroughs at a Nazi facility in occupied Norway. The British work with Norwegian Resistance head Knut Straud (Richard Harris) and distinguished physicist Dr. Rolf Pederson (Kirk Douglas) to plan an urgent response. As a Norwegian team headed by Straud struggles to stop Nazi science in its tracks, a civilian hostage situation erupts.

rating.system: Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Hudson Hawk
programme.desc: Thief extraordinaire Hudson Hawk has just been released from prison and all he wants is a nice cappuccino. However, before he can savor his favorite beverage, the highly eccentric and wealthy Darwin Mayflower and his equally odd wife, Minerva, rope Hawk into an ambitious series of heists. Soon Hawk is stealing no less than major works by Leonardo da Vinci, priceless pieces that the Mayflowers plan to use in an exceedingly nefarious way.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Major Dundee
programme.desc: During the end of the Civil War, Major Dundee guards Confederate prisoners, Union deserters and ordinary hard-bitten criminals in a remote fort. When Apaches attack the fort and make off with three children, Dundee must set up a posse including Confederates, who face a choice between joining up or being shot. The feud between Dundee and Tyreen is also heated up by a sultry Mexican widow.

programme.title: Ike: Countdown to D-Day
programme.desc: Gen. Dwight D. Eisenhower (Tom Selleck) faces monumental decisions in the 90 days leading to the Allied invasion of Normandy in 1944.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beyond Valkyrie: Dawn of the Fourth Reich
programme.desc: American and British special forces soldiers are sent to extract a resistance fighter from behind the Nazi lines near the end of World War II.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Okinawa
programme.desc: The courageous crew of the World War II battleship U.S.S. Drake paves the way for the invasion of Okinawa.

programme.title: Company of Heroes
programme.desc: During World War II, a group of American soldiers heads to the heart of Nazi Germany to find a scientist who developed a devastating weapon for Hitler and now wants to defect.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Hollow Man
programme.desc: The thought of human invisibility has intrigued man for centuries. Highly gifted scientist Sebastian Caine develops a serum that induces complete invisibility. His remarkable transformation results in unimaginable power that seems to suffocate his sense of morality and leads to a furious and frightening conclusion.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Unforgiven
programme.desc: The Zachary family live quietly on a cattle ranch in post-Civil War Texas. A stranger (Joseph Wiseman) appears and disturbs their bucolic existence by spreading a malicious rumor that their adopted daughter, Rachel (Audrey Hepburn), is a Kiowa Native American. Soon, the Zachary brothers (Audie Murphy, Burt Lancaster) and their mother (Lillian Gish) must defend themselves from both racist whites and vengeful Kiowa.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Places in the Heart
programme.desc: In 1935 rural Texas, recently widowed Edna Spaulding (Sally Field) struggles to survive with two small children, a farm to run and very little money in the bank -- not to mention a deadly tornado and the unwelcome presence of the Ku Klux Klan. Edna is aided by her beautician sister, Margaret (Lindsay Crouse) ; a blind boarder, Mr. Will (John Malkovich) ; and a would-be thief, Moze (Danny Glover), who decides to stick around to teach Edna how to plant and harvest cotton.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Random Hearts
programme.desc: After a plane crash in which both their spouses are killed, Sergeant Dutch Van Den Broeck and Congresswoman Kay Chandler's lives are connected. Their spouses were headed to the same address, with identical keys, under Mr. and Mrs. plane tickets. The investigation leads to startling discoveries and an unexpected romance.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Seems Like Old Times
programme.desc: Nick Gardenia (Chevy Chase) is a writer who has moved to a cabin in the California mountains to work on a novel. He is kidnapped by a pair of criminals and forced into robbing a bank. On the run from the law, Nick seeks assistance from his ex-wife, Glenda (Goldie Hawn), a big-hearted lawyer. Knowing he would never commit a crime, she lets him stay at her house despite the fact that her husband, Ira (Charles Grodin), a district attorney, is throwing a party for law enforcement officials.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Angel of Death
programme.desc: Haunted by her victims, a ruthless assassin (Zoe Bell) decides to kill her gangster employers.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: U-Turn
programme.desc: A two-bit criminal (Sean Penn) meets an attractive woman (Jennifer Lopez) and her spouse (Nick Nolte), each of whom wants him to murder the other.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Beast
programme.desc: A Soviet tank unit led by Commander Daskal (George Dzundza) destroys a village in Afghanistan in 1981. Taj (Steven Bauer), a member of the village, vows revenge and pursues him, along with the mujahideen. Meanwhile, the radical Daskal turns violent against his unit when he murders the tank crewman (Erick Avari) for his Afghan ethnicity and leaves tank driver Koverchenko (Jason Patric) to be killed by the mujahideen. Taj, however, offers Koverchenko sanctuary for his assistance against the unit.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Silverado
programme.desc: Rambling man Emmett (Scott Glenn) assembles a group of misfit cowboys (Kevin Costner), (Kevin Kline, Danny Glover). After helping a group of settlers track down a pack of thieves, Emmett and his men descend on the troubled town of Silverado to seek their fortunes. Soon after arriving, they discover that the town has fallen into the grasp of greedy rancher Ethan McKendrick (Ray Baker) and corrupt Sheriff Cobb (Brian Dennehy) with whom many of Emmett's men have unfinished business.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: 50 to 1
programme.desc: In 2009, the owners of Mine That Bird begin an important journey when their colt qualifies for the Kentucky Derby, the first jewel in U.S. horse racing's Triple Crown.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Jesse James vs. the Daltons
programme.desc: An outcast (Brett King) joins the Dalton gang and learns he is not the son of Jesse James.
